summary: Tested BookerInfoSection component and self-fill toggle across booking pages. Backend API /api/auth/me works correctly (8/8 tests passed). Found a bug in CarRentalBooking.jsx where formData uses firstName/lastName but UI references formData.name.

ui_bugs.issue: formData state has firstName/lastName fields but UI at line 473 uses formData.name which doesn't exist. Self-fill toggle sets firstName/lastName but UI displays empty name field. Validation at line 240 also checks formData.name.

action_items: Fix CarRentalBooking.jsx: Change formData.name references to use firstName/lastName or update the state structure to use 'name' field consistently
Update line 473: value={formData.name} should be value={`${formData.firstName} ${formData.lastName}`.trim()} or use a single 'name' field
Update line 240 validation: Check firstName instead of name
Update line 96 isDriverInfoComplete: Already uses firstName correctly
critical_code_review_comments: CarRentalBooking.jsx has inconsistent formData structure - state defines firstName/lastName but UI uses 'name' field
BookerInfoSection component is correctly implemented with gradient header, toggle, and 4 fields
All other booking pages (Hotel, Restaurant, Cinema, Event, Banquet, Travel, Package) correctly use BookerInfoSection or call /api/auth/me
/api/auth/me endpoint returns all required fields: full_name, email, phone, city, country, gender

success_rate.frontend: 87.5% (7/8 booking pages work correctly, CarRentalBooking has bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: BookerInfoSection component at /app/frontend/src/components/booking/BookerInfoSection.jsx is correctly implemented. All booking pages except CarRentalBooking.jsx use it correctly. CarRentalBooking.jsx has a bug where formData.name is referenced but doesn't exist in state (state has firstName/lastName). Previous iterations 90-91 passed.
rca_of_the_issue: CarRentalBooking.jsx was likely refactored to use firstName/lastName in state but the UI template still references the old 'name' field. The handleSelfChange function correctly sets firstName/lastName from /api/auth/me response, but the Input component at line 473 displays formData.name which is undefined.
